{{Infobox character
| name = Aunt Naria
| aliases = Naria
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Naria is [[Fury]]'s wife.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Naria is an [[Archlady]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Aunt Naria]] is not afraid of [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“What about Aunt Naria?” Fury’s wife was an Archlady, but she almost never fought anymore.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“What about Aunt Naria?” Fury’s wife was an Archlady, but she almost never fought anymore.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
